practice.reviewMistakesCta: Missed questions were added to your review list

simulation.introTitle: Simulation matching the real exam format
simulation.introBody: This mirrors the real format: one science subject (coefficient 2) then French (coefficient 1), each timed separately, scored out of 20 with a failing threshold at 5/20.
simulation.eliminatory: Note: this score is below 5/20, which would be disqualifying in the real exam
instructionsList: The exam has two separate sections: a science subject (coefficient 2), then French (coefficient 1).
Each section has its own time limit; the countdown starts as soon as that section begins.
Each question has exactly one correct answer out of 4 options.
You can change your answer to a question as long as you haven't moved to the next question yet.
No indication of whether your answers are correct will be shown during the exam — the result only appears at the end, just like the real exam.
Once a section's time runs out, moving to the next section (or to results) happens automatically.
simulation.instructionsDisclaimer: These instructions follow a standard multiple-choice exam format; they are not ISPITS's official wording — check the current year's official notice for exact details.
simulation.instructionsConfirm: I understand, start the first section

review.title: Review list

settings.apiKeyHelp: Your key is used directly from your device to the chosen provider only; it is never sent anywhere else.
